spec:
# CashPulse — Screen 3: Spending Insights
## Component Planning Specification v1.0

---

## 1. Component Tree

```
<SpendingInsightsScreen>                          [main, aria-label="Spending Insights"]
│
├── <GlobalTopBar>                                [nav, sticky, z-index: sticky(1100)]
│     ├── <LogoMark>                              [a, href="/dashboard"]
│     ├── <NavTabs>                               [nav, role="navigation"]
│     │     ├── <NavTab label="Dashboard">        [a]
│     │     ├── <NavTab label="Add Expense">      [a]
│     │     └── <NavTab label="Insights" active>  [a, aria-current="page"]
│     └── <TopBarControls>
│           ├── <MonthYearSelector>               [div, role="group"]
│           │     ├── <ChevronButton dir="prev">  [button, aria-label="Previous month"]
│           │     ├── <MonthLabel>                [span, aria-live="polite"]
│           │     └── <ChevronButton dir="next">  [button, aria-label="Next month"]
│           └── <SettingsGear>                    [button, aria-label="Settings"]
│
├── <InsightsContentArea>                         [div, max-width constrained, centred]
│     │
│     ├── <PeriodSummaryHeader>                   [section, aria-label="Period Summary"]
│     │     ├── <SummaryCell stat="totalSpent">
│     │     │     ├── <StatValue>                 [span, role="text"]
│     │     │     ├── <StatLabel>                 [span]
│     │     │     └── <TrendIndicator dir="down"> [span, aria-label="Down 12% vs last month"]
│     │     ├── <VerticalDivider>                 [div, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     ├── <SummaryCell stat="dailyAverage">
│     │     │     ├── <StatValue>
│     │     │     ├── <StatLabel>
│     │     │     └── <TrendIndicator dir="up">
│     │     ├── <VerticalDivider>                 [div, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     └── <SummaryCell stat="transactionCount">
│     │           ├── <StatValue>
│     │           ├── <StatLabel>
│     │           └── <TrendIndicator dir="down">
│     │
│     ├── <DailySpendingCard>                     [section, aria-label="Daily Spending Chart"]
│     │     ├── <CardHeader>
│     │     │     ├── <CardTitle>                 [h2]
│     │     │     └── <ChartToggleGroup>          [div, role="group", aria-label="Chart type"]
│     │     │           ├── <ToggleChip val="bar"> [button, aria-pressed="true"]
│     │     │           └── <ToggleChip val="line">[button, aria-pressed="false"]
│     │     ├── <ChartFigure>                     [figure, role="img", aria-label="…"]
│     │     │     ├── <ChartCanvas>               [svg or canvas]
│     │     │     │     ├── <YAxisGridlines>      [g, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     │     │     ├── <YAxisLabels>         [g, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     │     │     ├── <XAxisLabels>         [g, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     │     │     ├── <AverageReferenceLine>[line + label, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     │     │     └── <BarGroup> or <LinePath + AreaFill + DataPoints>
│     │     │     └── <ChartTooltip>              [div, role="tooltip", aria-live="polite"]
│     │     │           ├── <TooltipDate>
│     │     │           ├── <TooltipAmount>
│     │     │           └── <TooltipCount>
│     │     └── <EmptyChartState>                 [div, hidden when data present]
│     │
│     ├── <TopCategoriesCard>                     [section, aria-label="Top Categories"]
│     │     ├── <CardTitle>                       [h2]
│     │     ├── <StackedProportionalBar>          [div, role="img", aria-label="Category distribution"]
│     │     │     └── <StackedSegment × N>        [div, aria-label="{category}: {pct}%"]
│     │     ├── <CategoryRowList>                 [ul]
│     │     │     └── <CategoryRow × N>           [li]
│     │     │           ├── <CategoryDot>         [span, aria-hidden="true"]
│     │     │           ├── <CategoryName>        [span]
│     │     │           ├── <ProgressBarTrack>    [div, role="progressbar",
│     │     │           │                          aria-valuenow="{pct}", aria-valuemin="0",
│     │     │           │                          aria-valuemax="100"]
│     │     │           │     └── <ProgressBarFill>
│     │     │           └── <CategoryMeta>
│     │     │                 ├── <CategoryAmount>
│     │     │                 └── <CategoryPercent>
│     │     └── <EmptyCategoriesState>            [div, hidden when data present]
│     │
│     ├── <BiggestExpensesCard>                   [section, aria-label="Biggest Expenses"]
│     │     ├── <CardTitle>                       [h2]
│     │     ├── <ExpenseRankedList>               [ol, aria-label="Top 5 expenses ranked by amount"]
│     │     │     └── <ExpenseRow × 5>            [li]
│     │     │           ├── <RankCircle>          [span, aria-label="Rank {n}"]
│     │     │           ├── <ExpenseDetails>
│     │     │           │     ├── <MerchantName>  [span]
│     │     │           │     └── <ExpenseMeta>   [span] {category · date}
│     │     │           └── <ExpenseAmount>       [span]
│     │     ├── <SeeAllLink>                      [button, optional, hidden by default]
│     │     └── <EmptyExpensesState>              [div, hidden when data present]
│     │
│     ├── <MonthComparisonCard>                   [section, aria-label="Month over Month Comparison"]
│     │     ├── <CardTitle>                       [h2]
│     │     ├── <ComparisonBarGroup>              [div, role="img", aria-label="…"]
│     │     │     ├── <ComparisonColumn col="last">
│     │     │     │     ├── <ColLabel>            [span]
│     │     │     │     ├── <Bar>                 [div]
│     │     │     │     └── <ColAmount>           [span]
│     │     │     └── <ComparisonColumn col="current">
│     │     │           ├── <ColLabel>            [span]
│     │     │           ├── <Bar>                 [div]
│     │     │           └── <ColAmount>           [span]
│     │     ├── <SummaryBadge variant="favourable|unfavourable">
│     │     │     [span, role="status"]
│     │     └── <EmptyComparisonState>            [div, hidden when data present]
│     │
│     └── <ExportRow>                             [div, align="right"]
│           └── <ExportCSVButton>                 [button, aria-label="Export spending data as CSV"]
│                 ├── <DownloadIcon>              [svg, aria-hidden="true"]
│                 └── <ButtonLabel>              [span]
│
└── [aria-live polite region for announcements]   [div, aria-live="polite", visually hidden]
```

---

## 2. Layout Rules

### 2.1 Page Shell

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  GlobalTopBar (sticky, full-width, height: 56px)                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│         InsightsContentArea (centred, max-width variable)       │
│         padding: 32px 24px                                      │
│                                                                 │
│   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│   │  PeriodSummaryHeader (Card)                             │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  gap: 16px                                              │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  DailySpendingCard                                      │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  gap: 16px                                              │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  TopCategoriesCard                                      │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  gap: 16px                                              │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  BiggestExpensesCard                                    │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  gap: 16px                                              │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  MonthComparisonCard                                    │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  gap: 24px (export needs more breathing room)           │   │
│   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤   │
│   │  ExportRow (right-aligned)                              │   │
│   └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Card Base Layout

All five section cards share a base layout contract:

| Property | Value | Token |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Background | `#1E293B` | `surface-primary` / `navy-surface` |
| Border-radius | `10px` | `borders.radius.medium` |
| Padding | `24px` | `spacing.scale[4]` |
| Shadow | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` | `elevation.levels[1]` |
| Border | none (no explicit border on cards) | — |
| Width | `100%` of content area | — |

### 2.3 PeriodSummaryHeader Internal Layout

```
display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-items: center;
```

| Sub-element | Flex | Internal layout |
|-------------|------|-----------------|
| `SummaryCell` | `flex: 1` | `display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 16px 0` |
| `VerticalDivider` | `flex: 0 0 1px; align-self: stretch` | `height: auto; margin: 8px 0` |

- Three equal-width cells. Dividers are `flex: 0 0 1px` hairlines, not consuming column space.
- Cell internal vertical stack: `StatValue` → `StatLabel` → `TrendIndicator`, gap `4px`

### 2.4 DailySpendingCard Internal Layout

```
CardHeader:
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 16px;

ChartFigure:
  width: 100%; height: 200px; position: relative;

ChartTooltip:
  position: absolute; z-index: 1400; pointer-events: none;
```

- `ChartToggleGroup`: `display: flex; gap: 4px`
- Each `ToggleChip`: `height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 8px`
- Average reference line label is `position: absolute; right: 0; top: {computedY - 8px}`

### 2.5 TopCategoriesCard Internal Layout

```
CardTitle: margin-bottom: 12px;

StackedProportionalBar:
  width: 100%; height: 12px; border-radius: 6px;
  display: flex; overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 16px;

CategoryRowList:
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0;
  (rows separated by 1px border-bottom)

CategoryRow:
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  height: 44px; padding: 0 4px;
```

- Left zone (dot + name): `flex: 0 0 140px`
- Centre zone (progress bar): `flex: 0 0 120px`
- Right zone (amount + %): `flex: 1; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; align-items: baseline`

### 2.6 BiggestExpensesCard Internal Layout

```
ExpenseRankedList:
  list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column;

ExpenseRow:
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  height: 52px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid {slate-border};
  (no border on :last-child)
```

| Zone | Flex / Size |
|------|-------------|
| RankCircle | `flex: 0 0 28px; width: 28px; height: 28px` |
| ExpenseDetails | `flex: 1; overflow: hidden` |
| ExpenseAmount | `flex: 0 0 auto; white-space: nowrap` |

- `ExpenseDetails` internal: `display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px`
- `MerchantName`: truncates with `text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow: hidden`

### 2.7 MonthComparisonCard Internal Layout

```
ComparisonBarGroup:
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;

ComparisonColumn:
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;

ColLabel: (above bar)
Bar: width: 60px; max-height: 120px; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;
ColAmount: (below bar, caption)
```

- SummaryBadge: `display: block; margin: 0 auto; width: fit-content`
- Column layout: `ColLabel → Bar → ColAmount` (top to bottom, centred)

### 2.8 ExportRow Layout

```
ExportRow:
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-top: 24px;

ExportCSVButton:
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  height: 40px; min-width: 120px; padding: 0 16px;
```

---

## 3. Token Bindings

### 3.1 Global / Shell

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|----------|-------|----------------|
| `<body>` / page bg | `background-color` | `background-primary` → `deep-navy` | `#0F172A` |
| `GlobalTopBar` | `background-color` | `surface-primary` → `navy-surface` | `#1E293B` |
| `GlobalTopBar` | `border-bottom` | `1px solid` `border-default` → `slate-border` | `#334155` |
| `GlobalTopBar` | `box-shadow` | `elevation.levels[1]` | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| `NavTab` (active) | `color` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| `NavTab` (active) | `border-bottom` | `2px solid` `cta-primary` | `#F59E0B` |
| `NavTab` (inactive) | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `MonthLabel` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `ChevronButton` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `ChevronButton:hover` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `ChevronButton:focus` | `outline` | `2px solid` `border-focus` → `gold-amber`, `offset: 2px` | `#F59E0B` |

### 3.2 Card Base

| Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|----------|-------|----------------|
| `background-color` | `surface-primary` → `navy-surface` | `#1E293B` |
| `border-radius` | `borders.radius.medium` | `10px` |
| `box-shadow` | `elevation.levels[1]` | `0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)` |
| `CardTitle` `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `CardTitle` `font` | `typography.scale[heading-2]` | `DM Sans 16px/600` |

### 3.3 PeriodSummaryHeader

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|----------|-------|----------------|
| `StatValue` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `StatValue` | `font` | `typography.scale[heading-1]` | `DM Sans 24px/700` |
| `StatLabel` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `StatLabel` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| `TrendIndicator` (favourable, spend ↓) | `color` | `success` → `teal-success` | `#14B8A6` |
| `TrendIndicator` (unfavourable, spend ↑) | `color` | `error` → `coral-error` | `#F87171` |
| `TrendIndicator` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| `VerticalDivider` | `background-color` | `border-default` → `slate-border` | `#334155` |
| `VerticalDivider` | `width` | — | `1px` |
| Counter animation | `duration` | `motion.durations.normal` | `300ms` → spec calls for 400ms; use 400ms override |
| Counter animation | `easing` | `motion.easings.default` | `cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)` |

> **Note on transaction count trend:** Direction for transaction count uses `teal-success` when ↓ (fewer transactions is favourable) and `coral-error` when ↑, consistent with spend-reduction-is-good mental model.

### 3.4 DailySpendingCard

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|----------|-------|----------------|
| `ToggleChip` (selected) | `background-color` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| `ToggleChip` (selected) | `color` | `text-on-cta` → `deep-navy` | `#0F172A` |
| `ToggleChip` (unselected) | `background-color` | `surface-elevated` → `navy-raised` | `#293548` |
| `ToggleChip` (unselected) | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `ToggleChip` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.small` | `6px` |
| `ToggleChip:focus` | `outline` | `border-focus` `2px` offset `2px` | `#F59E0B` |
| Bar (default fill) | `fill` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| Bar (spike > 2× avg) | `fill` | `error` → `coral-error` | `#F87171` |
| Line stroke | `stroke` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| Line stroke-width | — | — | `2px` |
| Area fill | `fill` | `gold-amber` at `opacity.scale.subtle` | `rgba(245,158,11,0.1)` |
| Data point | `fill` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| Data point border | `stroke` | `surface-primary` → `navy-surface` | `#1E293B` |
| Data point `stroke-width` | — | — | `2px` |
| Data point `r` | — | — | `6px` |
| Avg reference line | `stroke` | `gold-amber` at `opacity.scale.muted` (60%) | `rgba(245,158,11,0.6)` |
| Avg reference line | `stroke-dasharray` | — | `4 4` |
| Avg ref label | `color` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| Avg ref label | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| X/Y axis labels | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| X/Y axis labels | `font` | `typography.scale[small]` | `DM Mono 11px/400` |
| Gridlines | `stroke` | `border-default` at `opacity.scale.muted` (30%) | `rgba(51,65,85,0.3)` |
| `ChartTooltip` | `background-color` | `surface-elevated` → `navy-raised` | `#293548` |
| `ChartTooltip` | `box-shadow` | `elevation.levels[2]` | `0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)` |
| `ChartTooltip` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.small` | `6px` |
| `TooltipDate` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `TooltipDate` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| `TooltipAmount` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `TooltipAmount` | `font` | `typography.scale[heading-3]` | `DM Sans 15px/500` |
| `TooltipCount` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `TooltipCount` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| Bar entrance animation | `duration` | `motion.durations.slow` | `600ms` |
| Bar entrance animation | `easing` | `motion.easings.emphasized` | `cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0,1)` |
| Stagger per bar | — | — | `30ms` |
| Toggle morph | `duration` | `motion.durations.fast` × ~1.5 | `250ms` |
| Tooltip fade | `duration` | `motion.durations.fast` | `150ms` |
| `z-index: tooltip` | `z-index` | `z_index.tooltip` | `1400` |

### 3.5 TopCategoriesCard

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|----------|-------|----------------|
| `StackedProportionalBar` | `height` | — | `12px` |
| `StackedProportionalBar` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| `StackedProportionalBar` background (track) | `background-color` | `border-default` → `slate-border` | `#334155` |
| `StackedSegment` | `background-color` | Category-specific palette (see §3.5.1) | — |
| Segment entrance | `duration` | `motion.durations.slow` | `600ms` |
| Segment entrance | `easing` | `motion.easings.default` | `cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)` |
| `StackedSegment:hover` | `transform` | `translateY(-2px)` | — |
| `StackedSegment:hover` transition | `duration` | `motion.durations.fast` | `150ms` |
| `CategoryDot` | `width / height` | — | `10px` |
| `CategoryDot` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.pill` | `50%` |
| `CategoryName` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `CategoryName` | `font` | `typography.scale[body]` | `DM Mono 14px/400` |
| `ProgressBarTrack` | `background-color` | `border-default` → `slate-border` | `#334155` |
| `ProgressBarTrack` | `height` | — | `6px` |
| `ProgressBarTrack` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.pill` | `9999px` |
| `ProgressBarFill` | `background-color` | Category-specific palette | — |
| `CategoryRow:hover` | `background-color` | `surface-elevated` → `navy-raised` | `#293548` |
| `CategoryRow:hover` `ProgressBarFill` | `filter` | `brightness(1.15)` | — |
| Row hover transition | `duration` | `motion.durations.fast` | `150ms` |
| `CategoryRow` | `border-bottom` | `1px solid` `border-default` | `#334155` |
| `CategoryAmount` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `CategoryAmount` | `font` | `typography.scale[body]` + weight 600 | `DM Mono 14px/600` |
| `CategoryPercent` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `CategoryPercent` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |

#### 3.5.1 Category Colour Palette

| Category | Colour | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Food & Dining | `#F59E0B` (`gold-amber`) | Primary brand accent, high visibility |
| Transport | `#38BDF8` (`info`) | Cool blue, distinct from amber |
| Shopping | `#A78BFA` | Violet — soft, differentiated |
| Bills & Utilities | `#FB923C` | Orange — warm, adjacent to amber but distinct |
| Health | `#34D399` | Emerald variant — life/health association |
| Entertainment | `#F472B6` | Pink — vivid, memorable |
| Other | `#64748B` (`muted-text`) | Neutral catch-all |

### 3.6 BiggestExpensesCard

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
|---------|----------|-------|----------------|
| `RankCircle` (#1) | `background-color` | `cta-primary` → `gold-amber` | `#F59E0B` |
| `RankCircle` (#1) | `color` | `text-on-cta` → `deep-navy` | `#0F172A` |
| `RankCircle` (#2–5) | `background-color` | `surface-elevated` → `navy-raised` | `#293548` |
| `RankCircle` (#2–5) | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `RankCircle` | `width / height` | — | `28px` |
| `RankCircle` | `border-radius` | `borders.radius.pill` | `50%` |
| `RankCircle` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| `MerchantName` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `MerchantName` | `font` | `typography.scale[body]` | `DM Mono 14px/400` |
| `ExpenseMeta` | `color` | `text-secondary` → `muted-text` | `#64748B` |
| `ExpenseMeta` | `font` | `typography.scale[label]` | `DM Mono 12px/500` |
| `ExpenseAmount` | `color` | `text-primary` → `silver-text` | `#CBD5E1` |
| `ExpenseAmount` | `font` | `typography.scale[body]` + weight 600 | `DM Mono 14px/600` |
| Row divider | `border-bottom` | `1px solid` `border-default` | `#334155` |
| Row fade-in (on month change) | `duration` | `motion.durations.fast` | `150ms` staggered `30ms` |

### 3.7 MonthComparisonCard

| Element | Property | Token | Resolved Value |
